find.locations: select distinct location from aopsnaps where location is not null
find.nameExists: select count(*),min(id),max(id) from aopsnaps where (original_taken_date between '@start' and '@end') and file_name='@filename'
find.cropCount: select count(*) from aopsnaps where import_source='@source'
find.albumSnaps: SELECT * FROM aopsnaps WHERE id IN (SELECT snap_id FROM aopalbum_items WHERE album_id=@album_id)
find.sessionUser: select u.* from aopusers u join aopsessions s where s.user_id = u.id and s.id=@session_id
